title: AggregatedPortfolioMirrorAggregate
description: Aggregated data for a single copy-trading relationship.

mirrorId.description: Mirror identifier. A value of 0 represents manually held positions.

mirrorAvailableCash.description: Cash available within this mirror for new copy positions.

mirrorDepositTotal.description: Total amount ever deposited into this mirror: initialInvestment + depositSummary.

mirrorWithdrawalTotal.description: Total amount ever withdrawn from this mirror.

mirrorStopLossPercentage.description: Stop-loss threshold as a percentage of the mirror's current value.

mirrorStopLoss.description: Stop-loss threshold in account currency. The mirror liquidates when its value falls to this level.

mirrorClosedPositionsPnl.description: Accumulated net profit from all closed positions within this mirror.

instrumentAggregates.description: Positions held within this copy-trading mirror, grouped by instrument.
